# 🏠 Universal Tuya Zigbee App v5.11.22

> **Last auto-update:** 2026-02-23 | **Drivers:** 138 | **Fingerprints:** 5644

The most comprehensive Tuya Zigbee app for Homey — supporting **138 device types** with **5644+ manufacturer fingerprints**.

## 📦 Install

- **Stable:** [Homey App Store](https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/)
- **Test (latest):** [Test Channel](https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/)
- **Source:** [GitHub](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee)

## 🆕 Latest Changes (v5.11.22)

Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.22 introduces 8 new fingerprints, enhances automation scripts, and improves device discovery functionality.

## 🔧 Features

- **Tuya DP Protocol** — Full support for cluster 0xEF00 devices (TS0601)
- **Standard ZCL** — TS0001-TS0008, TS011F, TS0201-TS0207, etc.
- **BSEED/Zemismart ZCL-only mode** — PacketNinja technique for multi-gang switches
- **Physical button detection** — Flow triggers for wall switch presses
- **Virtual buttons** — Remote toggle any gang from flows
- **Energy monitoring** — Power, voltage, current for smart plugs
- **Air quality sensors** — CO2, VOC, PM2.5, formaldehyde, temp, humidity
- **Cover/curtain motors** — Position control with tilt support
- **LED backlight control** — Off / Normal / Inverted modes

## 🐛 Report Issues

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/new)
- Include your device fingerprint (`_TZxxxx_xxxxx`) and Zigbee model ID (`TSxxxx`)
- Use Homey Developer Tools > Zigbee to find your device info

## 🌐 Device Finder

Check if your device is supported: [Device Finder](https://dlnraja.github.io/com.tuya.zigbee/)
